projectStatus.mockDataNote: Only the agreed exception remains: MOCK_TRAVELERS and getSaudisAbroadData (Saudi travelers / Saudis-abroad). All sector alert/event data is real. MOCK_EVENTS was fully removed (0 references).
mainRisks: GDACS (Natural Disasters) is fetched through a third-party CORS proxy (api.allorigins.win) and can fail silently.
Security: ACLED not configured (no ACLED_* env) and ReliefWeb not configured (no VITE_RELIEFWEB_APP_NAME) — both absent until credentials are added (warnings shown, no mock).
Official Statements: ReliefWeb backend appname (RELIEFWEB_APPNAME) not set — statements rely on GDELT + official RSS only.
Economic Changes: Alpha Vantage free tier is 25 requests/day (mitigated by 4h cache + World Bank fallback).
Travelers panel + Saudis-abroad section + travelersAtRisk counter still use mock data (agreed exception).
recommendedNextSteps: Add ACLED credentials (ACLED_ACCESS_TOKEN or ACLED_EMAIL+ACLED_PASSWORD) to activate conflict events.
Set VITE_RELIEFWEB_APP_NAME (approved appname) to activate ReliefWeb in the Security section.
Set RELIEFWEB_APPNAME (approved) to activate ReliefWeb in Official Statements.
Move GDACS off the allorigins proxy to a backend proxy endpoint for reliability.
Replace MOCK_TRAVELERS / getSaudisAbroadData with a real registry when a data source exists.
Remove or wire the dormant news.ts + NewsWidget.tsx (currently unused).

sources.name: U.S. State Department Travel Advisories
sources.purpose: authoritative per-country threat level (1-4) + risk indicators; scoring backbone
sources.notes: RSS at travel.state.gov, keyless, fetched server-side.

sources.name: GDELT
sources.purpose: recent security headlines matched to a country (timeline)
sources.notes: Best-effort; may rate-limit.

sources.name: ACLED
sources.notes: OAuth2 (backend only). No ACLED_* env set → not configured; card shows an ACLED-not-configured notice. No mock fallback.

sources.name: ReliefWeb
sources.purpose: humanitarian/security reports merged into country profiles
sources.notes: Fetched client-side with VITE_RELIEFWEB_APP_NAME (not set → not configured). ReliefWeb v2 also requires an APPROVED appname.

sources.name: gpt-oss (local Ollama)
sources.purpose: Arabic summary / explanation of the computed score
sources.notes: Defaults to http://localhost:11434 / gpt-oss:20b; heuristic fallback if unavailable. Analyses real data only.

issues: ACLED and ReliefWeb are not configured, so 2 of the 4 intended sources are inactive.
Score is deterministic from advisory text; ACLED fatalities only nudge it when configured.
recommendedFixes: Add ACLED credentials and VITE_RELIEFWEB_APP_NAME to activate the remaining real sources.

sources.name: USGS
sources.notes: Direct JSON, keyless.

sources.name: NASA EONET
sources.notes: eonet.gsfc.nasa.gov, keyless.

sources.name: EMSC
sources.notes: seismicportal.eu, keyless.

sources.name: GDACS
sources.notes: Fetched through third-party proxy api.allorigins.win — reliability risk; fails soft to [].

sources.name: gpt-oss (local Ollama)
sources.purpose: Arabic situation analysis in the detail panel
sources.notes: Heuristic Arabic fallback if the model is down.

issues: GDACS relies on a third-party CORS proxy (allorigins).
recommendedFixes: Proxy GDACS through the project backend instead of allorigins.

sources.name: WHO Disease Outbreak News
sources.notes: who.int/api/news, CORS-open, keyless.

sources.name: disease.sh
sources.notes: CORS-open, keyless.

sources.name: gpt-oss (local Ollama)
sources.purpose: risk level, Arabic summary, Saudi impact, recommendations from raw WHO data
sources.notes: If unavailable, panel shows raw WHO data + 'AI unavailable' warning (no fabricated analysis).

sources.name: Alpha Vantage
sources.notes: VITE_ALPHAVANTAGE_API_KEY is SET. Free tier 25/day → cached 4h.

sources.name: World Bank
sources.notes: Keyless, CORS-open. Used only when Alpha Vantage yields nothing.

sources.name: Yahoo Finance (GC=F)
sources.notes: Server-side via /api/gold (no browser CORS).

sources.name: gold-api.com
sources.notes: Fallback when Yahoo is unavailable.

sources.name: gpt-oss (local Ollama)
sources.purpose: reason-for-change analysis in the detail panel
sources.notes: Heuristic fallback with LOW confidence when the model is down.

issues: Alpha Vantage daily request cap; gold needs the /api/gold backend endpoint.

sources.name: GDACS + USGS + NASA EONET + EMSC
sources.purpose: map markers, event detail, and event counters (App events array)
sources.notes: The 'Global Alert Feed' panel is the container of the 5 sector cards; the map + counters use these real disaster events.

mockData.name: MOCK_EVENTS
mockData.problem: REMOVED. Previously mixed into App events; now 0 references in the project (verified).

issues: GDACS via allorigins proxy (shared with Natural Disasters).
recommendedFixes: Empty/error states already added: 'لا توجد تنبيهات حقيقية متاحة حاليًا' / 'تعذر جلب البيانات من المصدر الحقيقي'.

sources.name: GDELT
sources.notes: Server-side, keyless.

sources.name: Official RSS (gov.uk FCDO, UN News)
sources.notes: www.gov.uk + news.un.org, keyless, server-side.

sources.name: ReliefWeb
sources.notes: Backend RELIEFWEB_APPNAME not set (and needs an APPROVED appname) → 403 → falls back to GDELT + RSS. No mock.

sources.name: gpt-oss (local Ollama)
sources.notes: Keyword-heuristic fallback if unavailable.

sources.name: news.ts + NewsWidget.tsx (GDELT via allorigins)
sources.notes: Dormant/unreferenced — NOT rendered anywhere in the current UI.

recommendedFixes: Remove or wire the dormant news widget.

sources.name: App events (GDACS/USGS/EONET/EMSC)
sources.purpose: map markers + EventDetail + event counters (totalEvents, criticalEvents, affectedCountries, activeAlerts)
sources.notes: Event counters are computed only from real events. Each event card shows 'المصدر: <source>'.

mockData.name: MOCK_TRAVELERS
mockData.problem: Agreed exception: Saudi travelers are mock. Feeds the TravelerPanel (right sidebar), traveler markers, and the travelersAtRisk / notificationsSent counters.

mockData.name: getSaudisAbroadData
mockData.problem: Agreed exception: Saudis-abroad totals/distribution are mock (left sidebar top section).

issues: travelersAtRisk counter derives from mock travelers.
recommendedFixes: Wire a real Saudi registry/consular source when available; until then keep clearly-scoped as the only mock exception.
